review_text: Mamak paling best kat cyberjaya sebab harga murah dan makanan sedap

review_text: Tempat lepak , malam penuh
translated_text: hangout, full night

review_text:
Saya bukan kaki makan mamak. Kalau boleh nak elak makan mamak. Tapi sini masakan dia okay. Nasi kandar boleh dikatakan sedap. Ayam bawang dia memang terbaik. Ayam goreng memang padu. Cuma bila harga ayam dah start naik ni, saiz ayam jadi kecil. Macam ayam dara pun ada haha.

Masakan panas kat sini sedap-sedap. Tapi selalu tukar tukang masak. Gilir-gilir kot. Kalau kena anney yang sedap, memang sedap la. Nasi goreng daging, nasi goreng kampung, mi goreng mamak ayam dia memang padu teruk. Kue tiaw goreng pun sedap.

Dulu petang lepas pukul 3 ada nasi lemak lauk sambal kerang, macam-macam. Yang tu sedap tapi sekarang sudah takde. Lepas pukul 3 ada masakan panas melayu, style thai.

Pergi waktu lunch memang kena beratur panjang la sikit especially pukul 1 ke 2. Harga okay la bagi kedai mamak.
translated_text: I'm not a mamak. if you can, you want to avoid eating mamak. but here his cooking is okay. kandar rice can be said to be delicious. His onion chicken is the best. Fried chicken is awesome. only when the price of chicken already starts to rise, the size of the chicken becomes small. like a virgin chicken also there haha. hot food here is delicious. but always change the cook. alternate coats. if you have a delicious anney, it's really good fried meat rice, fried village rice, fried chicken mamak noodles, it's really awesome. fried tiaw cake is also delicious. last evening at 3 o'clock there was nasi lemak with sambal kerang side dishes, all kinds of things. that was good but now it's gone. after 3 o'clock there is Malay hot food, Thai style. go at lunch time, you have to queue a bit long, especially at 1 to 2 o'clock. the price is okay, give the mamak shop.

Fried chicken is awesome. only when the price of chicken already starts to rise, the size of the chicken becomes small. like a virgin chicken also there haha. hot food here is delicious. but always change the cook. alternate coats. if you have a delicious anney, it's really good fried meat rice, fried village rice, fried chicken mamak noodles, it's really awesome. fried tiaw cake is also delicious. last evening at 3 o'clock there was nasi lemak with sambal kerang side dishes, all kinds of things. that was good but now it's gone. after 3 o'clock there is Malay hot food, Thai style. go at lunch time, you have to queue a bit long, especially at 1 to 2 o'clock. the price is okay, give the mamak shop.

review_text:
Saya bukan kaki makan mamak. Kalau boleh nak elak makan mamak. Tapi sini masakan dia okay. Nasi kandar boleh dikatakan sedap. Ayam bawang dia memang terbaik. Ayam goreng memang padu. Cuma bila harga ayam dah start naik ni, saiz ayam jadi kecil. Macam ayam dara pun ada haha.

Masakan panas kat sini sedap-sedap. Tapi selalu tukar tukang masak. Gilir-gilir kot. Kalau kena anney yang sedap, memang sedap la. Nasi goreng daging, nasi goreng kampung, mi goreng mamak ayam dia memang padu teruk. Kue tiaw goreng pun sedap.

Dulu petang lepas pukul 3 ada nasi lemak lauk sambal kerang, macam-macam. Yang tu sedap tapi sekarang sudah takde. Lepas pukul 3 ada masakan panas melayu, style thai.

review_text: Beli thru online, just pick jer. Senang cite xpyh menunggu especially bila beli grill chicken. Rasa mmg xpenah berubah sejak mula2 dibuka. Yg berubah hanya harga yg semakin meningkat setiap tahun.  Itulah lumrah kehidupan di Malaysia. Harga mknn makin naik xsepadan dengan kenaikan gaji. Kadang2 gaji pun xnaik untuk beberapa tahun. Apapun, walaupun mahal, tetap juga beli, sebab dah dekat setahun xmkn Saba.
translated_text: buy thru online, just pick. It's easy to say, don't wait, especially when buying grill chicken. The taste has not really changed since it was first opened. the only thing that changes is the increasing price every year. that's normal life in malaysia. the price of mknn is increasing not corresponding to the salary increase. sometimes salaries also do not increase for several years. whatever, even if it's expensive, still buy it, because it's already been almost a year of not eating regularly.

Arabic rice sometimes I buy a lot of packages, sometimes it's a little. review_text: Makanan harga ok dan berpatutan. Bahagian dalam kedai agak panas dan kurang sejuk. Namun jika nak dikatakan ia restoran makanan arab paling sedap dalam Malaysia saya kurang bersetuju. 4 bintang untuk harga yang berpatutan, kurangnya satu bintang kerana ada kekurangan menu berbanding restoran makanan arab yang lain.
translated_text: food is ok and reasonable price. the inside of the store knew it was hot and less cold. but if you want to say that it is the tastiest Arabic food restaurant in Malaysia, I don't agree. 4 stars for reasonable prices, less than one star because there is a lack of menu compared to other Arabic food restaurants.

Elok lagi pelayan budak2 lelaki2...menyakitkan hati betul macam kita ni datang minta sedekah dari dia...tolonglah kita bayar tau...anoyying betul!!!!
